description_long: This is a modern, armless chair featuring a padded seat and backrest upholstered in black leather or faux leather with a quilted, tufted pattern. The seat and backrest are both thickly cushioned, providing comfort and a contemporary aesthetic. The frame and legs are constructed from dark-stained wood, with a smooth, slightly curved profile and a visible wood grain texture. The back of the chair is fully enclosed with wood, giving it a solid and elegant appearance. The legs are straight and tapered, contributing to a stable and sturdy structure. This chair is suitable for use in urban interiors such as cafes, offices, or waiting areas, where both style and comfort are desired.
description: A modern, armless chair with a quilted black leather seat and backrest, supported by a dark wood frame and tapered legs. The design is sleek, cushioned, and ideal for stylish indoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded, quilted black seat and backrest, with the wooden frame and legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest cushions, as well as the curved wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back panel and the full enclosure of the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the profile of the seat and backrest, and the wood grain on the frame.
